pve_actions.name: Spinning Edge
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 300.
Additional Effect: Increases Ninki Gauge by 5

pve_actions.name: Shade Shift
pve_actions.effect:
Create shadows that nullify damage up to 20% of maximum HP.
Duration: 20s

pve_actions.name: Gust Slash
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 240.
Combo Action: Spinning Edge
Combo Potency: 400
Combo Bonus: Increases Ninki Gauge by 5

pve_actions.name: Hide
pve_actions.effect:
Blend in with your surroundings, making it impossible for most enemies to detect you, but reducing movement speed by 50%. Has no effect on enemies 10 levels higher than your own, or certain enemies with special sight.
Additional Effect: Restores 2 charges to all mudra
The effect of Doton ends upon execution of Hide.
Cannot be executed while in combat.
Effect ends upon use of any action other than Sprint, or upon reuse of Hide.

pve_actions.name: Throwing Dagger
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers a ranged attack with a potency of 200.
Additional Effect: Increases Ninki Gauge by 5

pve_actions.name: Mug
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 150.
Additional Effect: Increases target's damage taken by 5%
Duration: 20s
Additional Effect: Increases the chance of additional items being dropped by target if Mug is dealt before, or as, the finishing blow

pve_actions.name: Trick Attack
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 300.
400 when executed from a target's rear.
Additional Effect: Increases damage you deal target by 10%
Duration: 15s
Can only be executed while under the effect of Hidden.

pve_actions.name: Aeolian Edge
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 220.
280 when executed from a target's rear.
Combo Action: Gust Slash
Combo Potency: 400
Rear Combo Potency: 460
Potencies are increased by 100 while under the effect of Kazematoi.
Combo Bonus: Increases Ninki Gauge by 15

pve_actions.name: Ten
pve_actions.effect:
Make the ritual mudra hand gesture for "heaven."
Duration: 6s
Maximum Charges: 2
Triggers the cooldown of weaponskills, mudra, and Ninjutsu upon execution.
Conversely, execution of weaponskills triggers the cooldown of this action.

pve_actions.name: Ninjutsu
pve_actions.effect:
Executes a specific ninjutsu action coinciding with the combination of mudra made immediately beforehand.
If any other action is used before the mudra are combined and the ninjutsu executed, Ninjutsu will fail.
Triggers the cooldown of weaponskills, mudra, and Ninjutsu upon execution.
Conversely, execution of weaponskills triggers the cooldown of this action.
Restores 2 charges to all mudra when Hide is executed while outside of combat.

pve_actions.name: Chi
pve_actions.effect:
Make the ritual mudra hand gesture for "earth."
Duration: 6s
Maximum Charges: 2
Triggers the cooldown of weaponskills, mudra, and Ninjutsu upon execution.
Conversely, execution of weaponskills triggers the cooldown of this action.

pve_actions.name: Death Blossom
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 100 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Increases Ninki Gauge by 5

pve_actions.name: Assassinate
pve_actions.effect: Delivers an attack with a potency of 200.

pve_actions.name: Shukuchi
pve_actions.effect:
Move quickly to the specified location.
Maximum Charges: 2
Cannot be executed while bound.

pve_actions.name: Jin
pve_actions.effect:
Make the ritual mudra hand gesture for "man."
Duration: 6s
Maximum Charges: 2
Triggers the cooldown of weaponskills, mudra, and Ninjutsu upon execution.
Conversely, execution of weaponskills triggers the cooldown of this action.

pve_actions.name: Kassatsu
pve_actions.effect:
Allows the execution of a single ninjutsu without consumption of mudra charges.
Additional Effect: Increases damage for the next ninjutsu action by 30%
Duration: 15s
Recast timer of mudra is not affected by the execution of this action.

pve_actions.name: Hakke Mujinsatsu
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 100 to all nearby enemies.
Combo Action: Death Blossom
Combo Potency: 120
Combo Bonus: Increases Ninki Gauge by 5

pve_actions.name: Armor Crush
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 240.
300 when executed from a target's flank.
Combo Action: Gust Slash
Combo Potency: 440
Flank Combo Potency: 500
Combo Bonus: Grants 2 stacks of Kazematoi
Kazematoi Effect: Increases potency of Aeolian Edge by 100
Maximum Stacks: 5
Combo Bonus: Increases Ninki Gauge by 15

pve_actions.name: Dream Within a Dream
pve_actions.effect: Delivers a threefold attack, each hit with a potency of 180.

pve_actions.name: Hellfrog Medium
pve_actions.effect:
Deals fire damage with a potency of 250 to target and all enemies nearby it.
Ninki Gauge Cost: 50
Shares a recast timer with Bhavacakra.

pve_actions.name: Dokumori
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack to all enemies in a cone before you with a potency of 400.
Additional Effect: Increases target's damage taken by 5%
Duration: 20s
Additional Effect: Increases the chance of additional items being dropped by target if Dokumori is dealt before, or as, the finishing blow
Additional Effect: Increases Ninki Gauge by 40
Additional Effect: Grants Higi
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Bhavacakra
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 400.
Meisui Bonus: Potency is increased to 550 when under the effect of Meisui
Ninki Gauge Cost: 50
Shares a recast timer with Hellfrog Medium.

pve_actions.name: Ten Chi Jin
pve_actions.effect:
Temporarily converts each of the three mudra into a ninjutsu action. Executing one of these actions will convert the remaining mudra into different ninjutsu actions until all three have been executed or the Ten Chi Jin effect expires.
Duration: 6s
Additional Effect: Grants Tenri Jindo Ready
Duration: 30s
Only ninjutsu available while active. The same ninjutsu cannot be executed twice.
Cannot be executed while under the effect of Kassatsu.

pve_actions.name: Meisui
pve_actions.effect:
Dispels Shadow Walker, increasing the Ninki Gauge by 50.
Additional Effect: Grants Meisui
Duration: 30s
Meisui Effect: Increases the potency of Zesho Meppo to 850 and Bhavacakra to 550
Can only be executed while in combat and under the effect of Shadow Walker.

pve_actions.name: Bunshin
pve_actions.effect:
Grants 5 stacks of Bunshin, each stack allowing your shadow to attack enemies each time you execute a weaponskill. Shadow attack potency varies based on the attack executed, but is not affected by combo bonuses.
Melee Attack Potency: 160
Ranged Attack Potency: 160
Area Attack Potency: 80
Ninki Gauge increases by 5 each time your shadow lands an attack.
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Grants Phantom Kamaitachi Ready
Duration: 45s
Ninki Gauge Cost: 50

pve_actions.name: Phantom Kamaitachi
pve_actions.effect:
Your shadow deals wind damage to target and all enemies within 5 yalms with a potency of 700.
Additional Effect: Increases Ninki Gauge by 10
Can only be executed while under the effect of Phantom Kamaitachi Ready.

pve_actions.name: Hollow Nozuchi
pve_actions.effect:
All enemies standing in the corrupted earth of Doton take additional earth damage with a potency of 70.
Requires Hakke Mujinsatsu to be executed as a combo action or upon executing Katon, Goka Mekkyaku, or Phantom Kamaitachi.
Effect can only be triggered while Doton is active.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.

pve_actions.name: Forked Raiju
pve_actions.effect:
Rushes target and delivers a lightning attack with a potency of 700.
Additional Effect: Increases Ninki Gauge by 5
Can only be executed while under the effect of Raiju Ready.
Cannot be executed while bound.

pve_actions.name: Fleeting Raiju
pve_actions.effect:
Deals lightning damage with a potency of 700.
Additional Effect: Increases Ninki Gauge by 5
Can only be executed while under the effect of Raiju Ready.

pve_actions.name: Kunai's Bane
pve_actions.effect:
Deals damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 700.
Additional Effect: Afflicts target with Kunai's Bane
Kunai's Bane Effect: Increases damage you deal target by 10%
Duration: 15s
Can only be executed while Hidden.

pve_actions.name: Deathfrog Medium
pve_actions.effect:
Deals fire damage with a potency of 400 to target and all enemies nearby it.
Ninki Gauge Cost: 50
Can only be executed while under the effect of Higi.
Shares a recast timer with Bhavacakra.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Hellfrog Medium changes to Deathfrog Medium when requirements for execution are met.

Ninki Gauge Cost: 50

Shares a recast timer with Hellfrog Medium.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Bhavacakra changes to Zesho Meppo when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Tenri Jindo
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 1,100.
Can only be executed while under the effect of Tenri Jindo Ready.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Ten Chi Jin changes to Tenri Jindo when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Fuma Shuriken
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers a ranged ninjutsu attack with a potency of 500.
Mudra Combination: Any one of the Ten, Chi, or Jin mudra
Triggers the cooldown of weaponskills, mudra, and Ninjutsu upon execution.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Ninjutsu changes to Fuma Shuriken when requirements for execution are met.

traits.name: All Fours
traits.effect: Reduces damage taken when falling.

traits.name: Fleet of Foot
traits.effect: Increases movement speed.

traits.name: Increase Attack Speed
traits.effect: Reduces weaponskill cast time and recast time, spell cast time and recast time, and auto-attack delay by 15%.

traits.name: Adept Assassination
traits.effect: Upgrades Assassinate to Dream Within a Dream.

traits.name: Shukiho
traits.effect: Increases Ninki Gauge by 5 upon successfully landing certain weaponskills or completing certain combos.

traits.name: Enhanced Shukuchi
traits.effect: Resets the recast timer for Shukuchi upon executing Katon, Raiton, or Hyoton on most targets.

traits.name: Mug Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Mug to Dokumori.

traits.name: Enhanced Shukuchi II
traits.effect:
Allows the accumulation of charges for consecutive uses of Shukuchi.
Maximum Charges: 2

traits.name: Melee Mastery
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Gust Slash to 120, Aeolian Edge to 140, and Armor Crush to 140.

traits.name: Enhanced Kassatsu
traits.effect: Upgrades Katon and Hyoton to Goka Mekkyaku and Hyosho Ranryu while under the effect of Kassatsu.

traits.name: Shukiho II
traits.effect: Increases Ninki Gauge by 10 upon successfully completing a combo with Aeolian Edge or Armor Crush.

traits.name: Shukiho III
traits.effect: Increases Ninki Gauge by 15 upon successfully completing a combo with Aeolian Edge or Armor Crush.

traits.name: Melee Mastery II
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Spinning Edge to 220, Gust Slash to 160, and Throwing Dagger to 200.

traits.name: Enhanced Meisui
traits.effect:
Increases the potency of Bhavacakra to 500 while under the effect of Meisui.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Enhanced Raiton
traits.effect:
Grants a stack of Raiju Ready upon executing Raiton.
Maximum Stacks: 3
Duration: 30s
Effect of Raiju Ready ends upon execution of any melee weaponskill.

traits.name: Trick Attack Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Trick Attack to Kunai's Bane.

traits.name: Melee Mastery III
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Spinning Edge to 300, Gust Slash to 240, Aeolian Edge to 220, Fuma Shuriken to 500, Raiton to 740, Suiton to 580, Armor Crush to 240, Bhavacakra to 400, Bhavacakra while under the effect of Meisui to 550, Forked Raiju to 700, and Fleeting Raiju to 700.

traits.name: Enhanced Dokumori
traits.effect:
Grants Higi upon executing Dokumori.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Enhanced Ten Chi Jin
traits.effect:
Grants Tenri Jindo Ready upon executing Ten Chi Jin.
Duration: 30s
Ten Chi Jin changes to Tenri Jindo while under the effect of Tenri Jindo Ready.
